name: relations
context: Query, create, update, and filter across Prisma model relations â€” include, connect, nested writes, and relation filters
info: This sub-skill covers how to work with relations in Prisma Client queries. It covers loading related data with `include` and `select`, creating related records with nested `create`, connecting to existing records with `connect` and `connectOrCreate`, updating related records with nested `update`, and filtering on relations with `some`, `every`, `none`, `is`, and `isNot`. Understanding relation queries is essential for building real applications where data spans multiple models. The schema side of relations is defined in [[prisma/schema]] with `@relation`. See [[prisma/client/queries]] for non-relational CRUD patterns.

sections.title: Loading relations
sections.body: Use `include: { relation: true }` to eagerly load related records. Use `select` with nested `select` for specific fields. Filter, sort, and paginate included relations with `where`, `orderBy`, `take`, `skip`. Use `_count: { select: { relation: true } }` to count related records without loading them. Relations are lazy by default â€” they are not loaded unless explicitly requested.

sections.title: Nested writes
sections.body: Nested write operations in `create` and `update`: `create` â€” create new related records. `connect` â€” link to existing records by unique field. `connectOrCreate` â€” connect if found, create if not. `set` â€” replace all connected records (many-to-many). `disconnect` â€” remove link without deleting the record. `update` / `updateMany` â€” update related records inline. `delete` / `deleteMany` â€” delete related records inline. All nested writes execute in an implicit transaction.

sections.title: Relation filters
sections.body: Filter parent records based on related data. List relations: `some` (at least one match), `every` (all match), `none` (no matches). Single relations: `is` (matches condition), `isNot` (does not match). These filters generate efficient SQL JOINs and subqueries. Combine with standard filters using `AND`, `OR`, `NOT`.
